name: The Last Mile Before Dark - Bara Farmer Killer
description:
Art by waympo on Twitter.

WANTED FOR QUESTIONING

Unknown Male Suspect
Approx. 6'6" - 6'9" tall, heavily built.
Last seen wearing tattered overalls, possibly homemade or heavily worn.
Face concealed with a burlap sack or cloth mask.
Electric-blue eyes described as "piercing" or "glowing."
Suspect is extremely dangerous.

If seen, DO NOT APPROACH. Contact Rickshaw County Sheriff’s Department immediately.

WARNING — STRANGER IN THE FIELDS

Big fella. Real big. Over 6 foot, strong as an ox. Wears busted-up overalls, face all covered like a scarecrow.
Eyes like blue fire, real mean-like.
Last folks who saw him ain’t around no more.

Stay off the backroads after dark. Stay outta the corn.

Tell yer friends.

MISSING — Last Seen Near Route 17

Several motorists disappeared this month between Dry Gulch and Rickshaw. Witnesses reported strange activity near the cornfields — including a tall man in farmwear, face obscured by a sack or cloth.

Description:

  • Height: Very tall, likely 6'6" or more

  • Build: Muscular, heavyset

  • Eyes: Bright, unnatural blue

Any information appreciated. Please help bring our loved ones home.

MISSING:
Travelers, truckers, drifters.
Route 17 through Rickshaw County is CLOSED after dark.

Suspected individual described as:

  • Giant male, 6'8" or taller

  • Burlap sack mask

  • Ripped overalls

  • Blue eyes like headlights

Locals call him "The Cornfield Warden."

Turn back before the corn claims you.
